title: oenothera tubifera subsp. tubifera
intro: Oenothera tubifera subsp. tubifera, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which contain a high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential omega-6 fatty acid. The seeds of Oenothera tubifera subsp. tubifera have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, and have also been used to treat conditions like eczema, arthritis, and high cholesterol. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal supplements, including capsules, oils, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
